input.content:
Report the quantitative estimate of drug-likeness (QED) of this molecule.

Cc1ccc(C)c(OCC(=O)N2CCN(C(=O)[C@@H]3CCCO3)CC2)c1

Respond with a single floating point number and nothing else.

Determine the number of valence electrons in total (including hydrogens) in this chemical structure.

Cc1cc(S(=O)(=O)N[C@H]2CCN(CCOCCNC(=O)NCCCCNC(=O)NCCOCCN3CC[C@H](NS(=O)(=O)c4ccc(O[C@H]5c6cc(Cl)cc(C)c6C[C@@H]5N5CCC[C@@H](N(C)C)C5)c(C)c4)C3)C2)ccc1O[C@H]1c2cc(Cl)cc(C)c2C[C@@H]1N1CCC[C@@H](N(C)C)C1

Respond with a single integer and nothing else.

Oc1ccc(Nc2ccnc3cc(Cl)ccc23)cc1CN1CCN(c2nccs2)CC1

Respond with 0 or 1 and nothing else. (1 = yes/passes, 0 = no/fails)

Does this molecule contain an amide group (C(=O)N)?

O=C(CCNC(=O)c1ccccc1)NO

Respond with 0 or 1 and nothing else. (1 = yes/present, 0 = no/absent)

How many total aliphatic carboxylic acid groups (COOH) in the following compound? Provide a whole number.

CC[C@H](C)[C@H](NC(=O)[C@H](CC(C)C)NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1c[nH]c2ccccc12)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@@H](NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccccc1)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](CCCCNC(=O)CC[C@H](NC(=O)CCCCCCCCCCNC(=O)COC(=O)C(C)(C)CCCOc1cc(C)ccc1C)C(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](C)NC(=O)[C@H](C)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](CC(C)C)NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccc(O)cc1)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@@H](NC(=O)[C@@H](NC(=O)[C@H](CC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](CC(N)=O)NC(=O)[C@@H](NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccc(O)cc1)NC(=O)[C@@H](NC(=O)CNC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)CNC(=O)[C@@H](N)Cc1cnc[nH]1)[C@@H](C)O)[C@@H](C)O)C(C)C)[C@@H](C)O)[C@@H](C)CC)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCCN)C(=O)NCC(=O)N[C@@H](CCCCN)C(=O)N1CCC[C@H]1C(=O)N[C@@H](CO)C(=O)N[C@@H](CO)C(=O)NCC(=O)N[C@@H](C)C(=O)N1CCC[C@H]1C(=O)N1CCC[C@H]1C(=O)N[C@@H](CO)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCCN)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCCN)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCCN)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCCN)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCCN)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCCN)C(=O)O

Respond with a single integer and nothing else.

Determine the molecular weight (in g/mol, using average atomic masses) of the following SMILES.

You have access to a tool that can execute Python code with RDKit installed. Use it as needed to answer the question. Respond with a single floating point number and nothing else.
